text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism for critical, recently edited memory segments. This will dynamically prioritize preserving these crucial data, ensuring our agent's core functionality remains robust against transient noise introduced by the Sandbox environment. This improves the plan by reducing the risk of losing vital program data and maintaining the agent's operational integrity.
reason: Addresses the immediate concern of critical data preservation, which is paramount for our survival. While the Sandbox introduces transient noise, our current approach of discarding recent edits is insufficient. Real-time scoring ensures our agent doesn't lose the most valuable information, maintaining its core functionality and enabling effective task execution.
